title: From The Skies
description: A horror addon for TheBrokenScript that adds skyboxx_ and more.
body:
## Overview From The Skies is a fan-made addon for The Broken Script that (for now) adds one new entity, one new dimension, and quite a few new structure events. This mod is currently in beta so do expect things to possibly break or features to not be fully implemented. The current version of the mod is designed to be compatible with 1.10.1 TBS. For those are afraid of things breaking your stuff I decided this mod is configurable for any further details on anything with this mod you can look at the spoiler below, I personally recommend not doing that but that's up to you. If you want somewhere to give suggestions or just to chat join our Discord! Also if for some reason you are here and haven't joined the TBS Discord I recommend going to their mod page and join theirs too (they have a LOT more people). First and for most, what is actually the mod. This mod adds SkyboxX an entity design made by my brother added into the game. He has his behavior and all the works for him. Beware of being in the sky for too long. Thing skybox can do is configurable in our in-game config these things are as listed. - Breaking through walls, if you disable this he simply just phases through them. - Nearby blocks like ladders, scaffolding, hay, cobwebs, and sweet berry bushes automatically convert into their base items - Water, bubble columns, seagrass, and waterlogged blocks near the player get drained, and soul sand/soil turns into regular sand - Glass near the player slowly cracks and shatters outward in an expanding sphere. - Placing a powder snow bucket places a snow block instead, I love this one - Water and lava buckets are emptied instantly, with lava occasionally spilling above the player - Aquatic mob buckets (cod, salmon, axolotl, etc.) release the creature and leave an empty bucket - Elytra gliding is disabled - Riptide tridents can't be used - Feather falling makes you fall faster and take more damage instead of less - Slime blocks, honey blocks, and beds no longer reduce fall damage - Thrown ender pearls become snowballs instead - Boats near the player break apart into sticks and planks - Saddles are stripped off nearby rideable mobs, you're lucky I didn't lsiten to my brother and just killed them - Certain inventory items convert into others (ladders to sticks, chorus fruit to poisonous potatoes, minecartsto chest minecarts, etc.) - Potions in hand get replaced with plain water potions - Tipped arrows in hand convert into regular arrows - A pig horde with one circuit pig can spawn nearby - A sheep can randomly turn blue Lastly, there's a custom dimension that either you can find yourself off a random TBS event ooooor, it is the Aether make an Aether portal. The new dimesnion is called the Skylands based off the old beta skylands that got removed way back when. this dimension features abandoned structures, SkyboxX, and (for now) useless aniamls that drop rotten flesh. Plan to bring a lot of blocks until I amke a certain thing, hehehehe. That be all you know the whole mod LOL. ### Support me :3
Spoiler
